envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. RULE 0 sovereignty absolute: AI never grants authority to other AI.

items.name: Authority Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed Authority Map regions (approval chains / delegated authority / dual-control requirements / break-glass paths / 'must never be assumed' surfaces).
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes which authority surfaces admins should approve. AI never grants authority autonomously. Dual-control mandatory for risky writes.
items.model_usage_notes: 'Must never be assumed' regions rank HIGH_CONFIDENCE because they are absolute exclusions. Dual-control requirements rank next because they gate risky writes. Break-glass paths require ADR-0050 governance.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Absolute exclusions from intake remain absolute downstream.
Risky writes mandatory dual-control regardless of plan tier.
Spend / hiring / external-commit / legal approval chains gate write authority.
Per Wave 2.1 §19; per-role delegation profiles require admin policy approval.
Break-glass paths require ADR-0050 governance + time-boxed audit.

items.rationale: 'Must never be assumed' regions + dual-control requirements rank first because they are absolute boundaries. Approval chains + delegation profiles follow. Break-glass paths require explicit ADR-0050 governance discipline.
cross_map_dependencies: Authority Map depends on Org Map (approval chains inherit reporting structure)
Workflow Map depends on Authority Map (workflow approval gates draw from authority chains)
Tool Map depends on Authority Map (connector-write gates require authority approval)
Memory / DMW Map depends on Authority Map ('must never be assumed' regions exclude DMW scope)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin policy approval at D4 + RULE 0 sovereignty absolute (AI never grants authority).
DMW_scope_implications: Authority Map bounds Twin write-side DMW provenance
Dual-control workflows constrain write-side DMW emission tracking
'Must never be assumed' surfaces excluded from any Twin DMW
Break-glass per ADR-0050 emits to bounded audit-only DMW scope
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every Authority Map region
RULE 0 sovereignty absolute: AI never grants authority to AI
Dual-control mandatory for risky writes per ADR-0026
ADR-0050 break-glass for emergency authority only
Per-call governance approval required for any authority-bound execution
